embed.title: Quest 3 Straps
embed.description: Please select a strap below for more information, or 'Summary' for an overview.

embeds.title: Quest 3 Straps
embeds.description:
The Quest 3 supports modular head straps, and as such, many accessories are available. In the dropdown below, you can see details on several straps, including photos. 

 **Important:** Quest 2 straps **are not** compatible with Quest 3 out of the box.

fields.name: BOBOVR M3 Mini Sports
fields.value: The BOBOVR M3 mini is a headstrap similar to that of the Meta Elite Strap, but at a cheaper asking price. This is a minimalistic yet comfortable strap.

fields.name: BOBOVR S3 Pro
fields.value: The BOBOVR S3 Pro is a pricey headstrap similar to its other battery straps, however it has ''2 times'' the capacity of the B2, thanks to its 10,000mAh battery, and also includes a built-in Air Conditioning system.

fields.name: Kiwi K4 Comfort Headstrap
fields.value: The Kiwi K4 Comfort Headstrap is similar to the official Elite Strap but at a cheaper asking price. This version varies from the base comfort strap in that it has a Stealth Knob, and additional cushioning.

fields.name: KIWI design H4 Halo Comfort Head Strap
Kiwi Battery Headstrap
fields.value: The Kiwi Battery Headstrap is similar to the comfort headstrap, but it has a built-in battery, extending playtime for 2+ hours in one charge.

fields.name: BOBOVR M2 > M3 Pro Retrofit Kit
fields.value: This kit allows you to retrofit your old M2 Pro strap into a new one that fits the Quest 3s design, saving you the money of having to purchase a new strap all together.

fields.name: KIWI design H4 Boost Battery Halo
fields.value: Halo-style strap with Single-Point-Charging (Charge Quest and Battery with one cable) with FOV adjustment.

fields.name: KIWI design K4 Boost Battery
fields.value: Elite-style strap with Single-Point-Charging (Charge Quest and Battery with one cable).

embeds.title: BOBOVR M3 Mini Sports
embeds.description:
The BOBOVR M3 Mini is a comfort strap in the old fashion Elite strap-style, it is made to fit nicely around the head without interference around the ears. It is a simplistic yet comfortable strap

It can be found in multiple regions and is a good choice for a comfort upgrade.

embeds.title: BOBOVR S3 Pro
embeds.description: The BOBOVR S3 Pro Super is a 'halo' style strap that's quite pricier than it's competitors, but offers a lot for the price. It has a 10,000 mAh battery, which is twice the capacity of their B2 Strap's battery, and has a built-in Air Conditioning system, and can still be hotswapped.

embeds.title: Kiwi K4 Comfort Headstrap
embeds.description: The Kiwi K4 Comfort Headstrap features an adaptive headrest that cradles the back of your head similar to an Elite Strap.

pages.name: KIWI design H4 Halo Comfort Head Strap
pages.title: KIWI design H4 Halo Comfort Head Strap

embeds.title: KIWI design H4 Halo Comfort Head Strap
embeds.description: The KIWI design H4 Halo Comfort Head Strap is designed for zero facial pressure, using an adaptive front headrest design that distributes the weight of the Quest 3/3S.

embeds.title: Kiwi Battery Headstrap
embeds.description: The Kiwi Battery Headstrap is an upgraded version of it's base Comfort headstrap, allowing for longer playtimes and 2PC charging, it has a 6400mAh battery, ensuring your headset will stay charged for a minimum of 2-4h's (depending on load), and has a memory foam backing.

pages.name: BOBOVR M2 > M3 Pro Retrofit Kit
pages.title: BOBOVR M2 > M3 Pro Retrofit Kit

embeds.title: BOBOVR M2 > M3 Pro Retrofit Kit
embeds.description:
BOBOVR has launched a retrofit kit that allows any owners of the BOBOVR M2 Pro to convert their strap into a retrofitted Quest 3 strap. In the kit you will find additional cushions, mounting plastics, screws and a screwdriver.

 On the site you will find more information as well as instructions. 

 **Note as of 2023-12-29:** Due to shortages this kit is currently unavailable in many places, including certain regional Amazons. The links below might not work

pages.name: KIWI design H4 Boost Battery Halo
pages.title: KIWI design H4 Boost Battery Halo

embeds.title: KIWI design H4 Boost Battery Halo
embeds.description:
The KIWI design H4 Boost Battery Halo is a premium halo-style strap featuring Single-Point-Charging, which allows you to charge both your Quest and the battery with a single cable. It also includes FOV adjustment capability to optimize your field of view.

With a 5300mAh battery, this strap provides extended playtime while maintaining comfort with its balanced weight distribution across the halo design.

embeds.title: KIWI design K4 Boost Battery
embeds.description:
The KIWI design K4 Boost Battery is an elite-style strap with Single-Point-Charging technology, allowing you to charge both your Quest and the strap's battery with a single cable. This streamlined charging solution eliminates the need for multiple cables or power sources.

Featuring a 5300mAh battery, the K4 Boost provides substantial additional playtime while maintaining a relatively lightweight design at 358g.
